CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Case consolidated with Case No. 400366 Krueger Bros Builder, Inc. vs. Downs. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders Consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. After Hearing, Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar. (212)
